title: Gli articoli indeterminativi
grammar_features_introduced: the four indefinite article forms: un, uno, una, un'
masculine un before consonants AND vowels (no apostrophe)
uno before s+cons, z, gn, ps, pn (rescue rule mirroring definite lo)
feminine una before consonants, un' (with apostrophe) before vowels
the masculine/feminine asymmetry before vowels: un vs un'
absence of plural indefinite article; partitive dei/degli/delle as substitute
pronunciation_features_introduced: un + vowel: n flows phonologically into the vowel without apostrophe
notes: Second A1 grammar lesson; builds directly on 001-articoli-determinativi. The central pedagogical point is the masculine un / feminine un' asymmetry before vowels. Notes for French speakers highlight the orthographic difference despite similar phonology.
